title: Single Food Life Cycle Infographic AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Vertical educational infographic showing the life cycle of an avocado from Firm to Ready to Soft to Overripe to Spoiled. English labels: Firm, Ready, Soft, Overripe, Spoiled, Storage Tip. Clean cream background, realistic avocado slices and whole fruit, arrows, small callouts, organized science poster layout. English-only visible text. No Chinese characters anywhere. Clean readable English labels. No watermarks, no fake platform logos, no unreadable pseudo text. variant focus: Single Food Life Cycle Infographic V1. visible text language: English only.
